General.Name: Les Hotels Bav
General.Description: Les Hôtels Baverez S.A. owns and operates 5-star hotels in France. The company operates three hotels, including Hotel Regina; Hotel Raphael; and Majestic Hôtel-Spa. Its hotels include restaurants and wellness areas. Les Hôtels Baverez S.A. was incorporated in 1957 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
